MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st December, 2017 G.S.R. 1479(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 48 of the Coffee Act, 1942 (VII of 1942) the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2014, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2014, (hereinafter referred to as the principal rules), for rule 2, the following rule shall be inserted, namely: - “(1) In these rules, unless the context otherwise requires,- (a) “Act” means the Coffee Act, 1942 (VII of 1942); (b) “Cadre” refers to classification of posts and the sanctioned strength of posts in each cadre from the notification of these rules and is as listed in Annexure-I to these rules; (c) “Competent Authority” means the Secretary of the Board; (d) “Executive Committee” means the Committee constituted as Executive Committee under the Act, amended from time to time; (e) “Government” means the Central Government; (f) “Schedule” means the Schedule annexed to these rules; (g) “Scientific”, “Technical” and “Non-Technical” - Administrative or Ministerial Posts means the posts classified as such in the Annexure-I, to these rules. (2) The words and expressions used but not defined in these rules but defined in the Act shall have the same meaning respectively as given to them in the Act”. -- 8 of 15 -- [ ^ I I - ^ 3 ( i ) ] TO ^ Jfsm : <mm°\ 9 3 . In the principal rules, in the Schedule,- (a) under the heading ‘(i) “Non-Technical” Administrative or Ministerial Posts’,- (i) against serial number 5, for columns 4 to 13 and the entries relating thereto, the following columns and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely:- “4 5 6 7 8 Selection Not applicable Not applicable Not applicable Two years in case of promotion from among the officers of the Coffee Board holding post in the pay band-2, ` 9300-34800 with grade pay of ` 4600 (pre-revised) 9 By promotion in case of Deputy Director (Administration) and by deputation in case of Deputy Director (Accounts). 10 Promotion: From among the officers of the Coffee Board in pay band-3 ` 15600-39100 with grade pay of ` 5400 (pre-revised) with five years’ regular service in the grade or officers of the Coffee Board in pay band-2 ` 9300-34800 with grade pay of ` 4600 (pre- revised) with seven years’ regular service in the grade having the following educational qualification on the basis of a written examination. Degree from a recognized Qualification: University. Note1: Where juniors have completed their qualifying or eligibility service are being considered for promotion, their seniors shall also be considered provided they are not short of the requisite qualifying or eligibility service by more than half of such qualifying or eligibility service or two years, whichever is less, and have successfully completed their probation period for promotion to the next higher grade along with their juniors who have successfully completed their probation period for promotion to the next higher grade along with their juniors who have already completed such qualifying or eligibility service. Note 2: For the purpose of computing minimum qualifying service for promotion, the service rendered on a regular basis by an officer prior to the 1st January, 2006 or the date from which the revised pay structure based on the recommendations of the Sixth Central Pay Commission has been extended, shall be deemed to be service rendered in the corresponding grade pay or pay Scale extended based on the recommendations of the said Pay Commission. Deputation: Officers of the Central Government or State Government or public sector undertaking, - (a) holding analogous post on a regular basis in the parent cadre or department; or (b) five years’ service in the grade rendered after appointment thereto on 11 1. Secretary Coffee board – Chairman 2. Any one officer at the level of Director – Member 3. One outside officer in the interest of the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes - Member 12 Secretary 13 Not applicable.”; -- 9 of 15 -- 10 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] regular basis in pay band–3 `15600- 39100 with grade pay of ` 5400 (pre-revised) or equivalent in the parent cadre or department. Note 1: The period of deputation including the period of deputation in another ex-cadre post held immediately preceding this appointment in the same or some other organization or Department of the Central Government shall ordinarily not to exceed three years’. Note 2: The maximum age limit for appointment by deputation shall be not exceeding 56 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications. Note 3 : For the purpose of appointment on deputation, the service rendered on a regular basis by an officer prior to the 1st January, 2006 or the date from which the revised pay structure based on the recommendations of the Sixth Central Pay Commission has been extended, shall be deemed to be service rendered in the corresponding grade pay or pay scale extended based on the recommendations of the said Pay Commission except where there has been merger of more than one pre-revised scale of pay into one grade with a common grade pay or pay scale, and where this benefit will extend only for the post (s) for which that grade pay or pay scale is the normal replacement grade without any upgradation. (ii) against serial number 6, relating to the post of ‘Deputy Director [Official Language]’, in column 8, for the existing entry, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:- “Two years, in case of selection from among the officers of the Coffee Board holding post in the pay band-2, `9300-34800 with grade pay of `4600 (pre-revised).”; (iii) against serial number 20, relating to the post of ‘Senior Assistant’, in column 9, for the existing entries, the following entry shall be substituted, namely:- “By promotion.”. (b) under the heading ‘(ii) “Scientific” Posts,- (i) against serial number 1, relating to the post of ‘Director of Research’, in column 6, under the sub-heading ‘Experience’, for the existing entries, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:- “Twenty years’ experience in agricultural research or agricultural extension or agricultural teaching in an institution recognised by the Central Government or State Government, of which, three years shall be in the post with a grade pay of `7600 (pre-revised) or with ten years’ experience in the post with grade pay of `6600 (pre- revised) in a senior supervisory level with proven record of work and creative ability preferably in the form of scientific papers published in reputed National or International Scientific Journals.”;
